title: Whitehawk
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
The '''''Whitehawk''''' was a [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|Nebulon-B Frigate]] in service with the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. It arrived to assist Keyan Farlander defending a [[Leafar]] Convoy from the Star Destroyer ''Badi Dea'' . The operation was a success and the Imperials were thwarted.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Tour of Duty: Imperial Pursuit]]''

==Sources==
*<!-- 1995-03-XX -->''[[X-Wing Collector's CD-ROM: The Official Strategy Guide]]''
